description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean lines. The front facade is dominated by a large, dark double garage door with gold decorative accents and a wide horizontal window above, allowing natural light into the upper living space. The exterior walls are finished in a muted lavender-gray color, contrasting with the cream-colored interior walls visible through the windows and open sections. The interior layout includes a staircase, a visible living area with furniture, and a hallway with wall-mounted decor and cabinetry. The rear and side elevations are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall structure is compact and urban, suitable for dense city neighborhoods.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a large garage door, wide front window, and muted lavender-gray exterior. The design is boxy and urban, with minimal windows on the sides and a bright, open interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large garage door with gold accents, wide upper window, and partial interior including a staircase and living area.
description_view_1: Rear view with a solid lavender-gray wall and minimal window openings, highlighting the privacy-focused design.
description_view_2: Side view with a long, uninterrupted wall and a glimpse of the upper window and interior layout.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the entryway corridor, interior cabinetry, and wall decor, as well as the open stairwell area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture window on front, minimal side and rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry integrated with a large decorative garage door, no porch or steps, clean lines and minimal ornamentation
